mechanism_narrative: A 5-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The 5-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 5-day forward return in periods without rising industrial production (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals a weakening labor market that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The 20-day forward return is not significantly lower than the 20-day forward return in periods without rising unemployment (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in the Consumer Price Index signals a weakening inflation environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The 60-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 60-day forward return in periods without declining inflation (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month rise in housing starts above 1.4 million signals a strengthening supply environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The 20-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 20-day forward return in periods without rising housing starts (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in real disposable personal income and a 2-month increase in industrial production signal a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The 20-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 20-day forward return in periods without rising real disposable personal income and industrial production (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in initial unemployment claims above 250,000 signals a weakening labor market that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The 5-day forward return is not significantly lower than the 5-day forward return in periods without rising initial unemployment claims (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in the federal funds rate below 4.5% signals a monetary easing cycle that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The 60-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 60-day forward return in periods without declining federal funds rate (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in real GDP and a 2-month increase in industrial production signal a strengthening demand environment that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The 20-day forward return is not significantly higher than the 20-day forward return in periods without rising real GDP and industrial production (t-test p > 0.05).
